sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29165" key="du/skoitos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δύσ-κοιτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29165.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making bed unpleasant</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4000.tlg001:2:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristaenet.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
